name: albert-theme-builder
desc: A tool to create themes for Albert launcher.

name: keypirinha-theme-builder
desc: A tool to create themes for Keypirinha launcher.

name: keypirinha-volumecontrol
desc: Increase, decrease, mute or unmute the volume on Windows using Keypirinha.

name: keypirinha-phpdocsearch
desc: Search for functions, classes and everything else related to the PHP documentation directly from Keypirinha launcher.

name: keypirinha-gitmoji
desc: Search for gitmoji and copy them to your clipboard.

name: keypirinha-moviedb
desc: Search through TMDB (themoviedb.org) for movies, TV shows and people.
